title: Backports for v3.2.2
body: Missing https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10723 and https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10688 right now as these require c/common backports. Working on that now.

comments.body:
A couple of release notes nits.  I think one should be fixed, but I'm fine if you want to merge this and chase that with a separate PR.
Happy green test buttons
LGTM
@mheon, can you add another to commit to vendor in c/common v0.38.11 (https://github.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.38.11)?
Also https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10638/commits/ad3b56c62f07bbbd97433e972db0a0582dd84840 would be great if you repush anyway.
Done, repushed with 0.38.11 and final backports
